## Quanta Services flagged as potentially overvalued by up to 39% following new buyback announcement

If the overvaluation read is credible, PWR's buyback may represent capital deployed at a stretched multiple — a capital allocation red flag; for a datacenter EPC name riding AI construction tailwinds, multiple sustainability is a key thesis risk to track.

- PWR announced a new share buyback.
- One analysis flags the stock as potentially 39% overvalued on a post-buyback basis.
- Valuation and capital allocation signal for a datacenter EPC name with AI infrastructure exposure.
- Single-source analysis; the overvaluation claim warrants independent verification.
